business_name: Lost Key NZ | Automotive Locksmith Auckland

reviews.text: Absolute lifesavers! Locked my keys in my car at midnight in the rain. They arrived within 20 minutes and had me back on the road. Very professional and reasonably priced for an emergency callout.

Lost the only transponder key for my Toyota. The dealer quoted me over $800 and a 3-day wait. Lost Key NZ came out the same day and cut and programmed a new key on the spot for a fraction of the price. Highly recommend!

Fast, friendly, and efficient. Upgraded all the locks on our new commercial property. The team provided great advice on high-security options. Will definitely use them again for our property management business.
Great service! Called them on a Sunday morning and they were here in 30 mins. Friendly guy, explained what he was doing, and fixed my front door lock perfectly.
Very reliable locksmith service. Took slightly longer to arrive than estimated due to Auckland traffic, but once here, the job was done flawlessly and without any damage to the door.
